_note: The reigning House of Stuart, 1600-1714, descending from James VI & I (JVI, pre-existing). Covers Charles I through Anne, the last Stuart monarch. Union dot = marriage. Elizabeth Stuart (the 'Winter Queen') is created here but her descent to the House of Hanover is extended in a separate file. Mary II & William III reigned jointly (William was also Mary's first cousin, son of Charles I's daughter Mary, Princess Royal). Standard, well-documented British royal genealogy.

families.note: James VI & I & Anne of Denmark -> Henry Frederick, Elizabeth, Charles I

b.label:
Anne of Denmark
1574-1619 · Queen consort; wife of James VI & I

children.label:
Henry Frederick, Prince of Wales
1594-1612 · heir apparent who died young, no issue

Elizabeth Stuart
1596-1662 · the 'Winter Queen'; m. Frederick V, Elector Palatine; her line leads to the House of Hanover

👑 Charles I
1600-1649 · King of England, Scotland & Ireland; executed 1649

families.note: Charles I & Henrietta Maria of France -> Charles II, Mary, James II, Henry, Henrietta Anne

b.label:
Henrietta Maria of France
1609-1669 · Queen consort; Bourbon princess, daughter of Henri IV

children.label:
👑 Charles II
1630-1685 · restored to the throne 1660

Mary, Princess Royal
1631-1660 · m. William II of Orange

Henrietta Anne
1644-1670 · m. Philippe I, Duke of Orléans

families.note: Mary, Princess Royal & William II of Orange -> William III

b.label:
William II, Prince of Orange
1626-1650 · Stadtholder of the Dutch Republic

children.label:
👑 William III of Orange
1650-1702 · ruled jointly with Mary II

families.note: Charles II & Catherine of Braganza -> no legitimate issue

b.label:
Catherine of Braganza
1638-1705 · Queen consort; Portuguese princess, no legitimate issue

families.note: James II & Anne Hyde -> Mary II, Anne

b.label:
Anne Hyde
1637-1671 · first wife of James II; Duchess of York

families.note: James II & Mary of Modena -> James Francis Edward (the Old Pretender)

b.label:
Mary of Modena
1658-1718 · second wife of James II; Queen consort

children.label:
James Francis Edward Stuart
1688-1766 · 'the Old Pretender'

families.note: Mary II & William III -> the joint monarchy, no issue
Anne & George of Denmark -> no surviving heir; the crown passed to the House of Hanover

b.label:
Prince George of Denmark
1653-1708 · consort of Queen Anne; 17 pregnancies, no surviving heir, so the crown passed to the House of Hanover
